skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Wide-Range
skills.description: Allows the effects of certain items to also affect nearby allies.

levels.description: Items affect nearby allies with 33% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius with 33% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius at 66% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with 66% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with full efficacy.

skills.name: Wide-Range
skills.description: Allows the effects of certain items to also affect nearby allies.

levels.description: Items affect nearby allies with 33% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius with 33% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius at 66% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with 66% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with full efficacy.

skills.name: Maximum Might
skills.description: Increases affinity as long as stamina is kept full for a period of time.

levels.description: While active, increases affinity by 10%.
While active, increases affinity by 20%.
While active, increases affinity by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 40%.
Increases affinity by 40% as soon as the stamina gauge is full.

skills.name: Sleep Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of sleep buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

levels.description: Sleep buildup +5% Bonus: +10
Sleep buildup +10% Bonus: +10
Sleep buildup +20% Bonus: +10
Sleep buildup +30% Bonus: +10
